MASK_INDENT) >>> 24) + ((this._endIndexes[index] & MASK_INDENT) >>> 16);\n   197\u2192\t\tif (parent === MAX_FOLDING_REGIONS) {\n   198\u2192\t\t\treturn -1;\n   199\u2192\t\t}\n   200\u2192\t\treturn parent;\n   201\u2192\t}\n   202\u2192\n   203\u2192\tpublic contains(index: number, line: number) {\n   204\u2192\t\treturn this.getStartLineNumber(index) <= line && this.getEndLineNumber(index) >= line;\n   205\u2192\t}\n   206\u2192\n   207\u2192\tprivate findIndex(line: number) {\n   208\u2192\t\tlet low = 0, high = this._startIndexes.length;\n   209\u2192\t\tif (high === 0) {\n   210\u2192\t\t\treturn -1; // no children\n   211\u2192\t\t}\n   212\u2192\t\twhile (low < high) {\n   213\u2192\t\t\tconst mid = Math.floor((low + high) / 2);\n   214\u2192\t\t\tif (line < this.getStartLineNumber(mid)) {\n   215\u2192\t\t\t\thigh = mid;\n   216\u2192\t\t\t} else {\n   217\u2192\t\t\t\tlow = mid + 1;\n   218\u2192\t\t\t}\n   219\u2192\t\t}\n   220\u2192\t\treturn low - 1;\n   221\u2192\t}\n   222\u2192\n   223\u2192\tpublic findRange(line: number): number {\n   224\u2192\t\tlet index = this.findIndex(line);\n   225\u2192\t\tif (index >= 0) {\n   226\u2192\t\t\tconst endLineNumber = this.getEndLineNumber(index);\n   227\u2192\t\t\tif (endLineNumber >= line) {\n   228\u2192\t\t\t\treturn index;\n   229\u2192\t\t\t}\n   230\u2192\t\t\tindex = this.getParentIndex(index);\n   231\u2192\t\t\twhile (index !== -1) {\n   232\u2192\t\t\t\tif (this.contains(index, line)) {\n   233\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn index;\n   234\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   235\u2192\t\t\t\tindex = this.getParentIndex(index);\n   236\u2192\t\t\t}\n   237\u2192\t\t}\n   238\u2192\t\treturn -1;\n   239\u2192\t}\n   240\u2192\n   241\u2192\n   242\u2192\tpublic toString() {\n   243\u2192\t\tconst res: string[] = [];\n   244\u2192\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < this.length; i++) {\n   245\u2192\t\t\tres[i] = `[${foldSourceAbbr[this.getSource(i)]}${this.isCollapsed(i) ? '+' : '-'}] ${this.getStartLineNumber(i)}/${this.getEndLineNumber(i)}`;\n   246\u2192\t\t}\n   247\u2192\t\treturn res.join(', ');\n   248\u2192\t}\n   249\u2192\n   250\u2192\tpublic toFoldRange(index: number): FoldRange {\n   251\u2192\t\treturn {\n   252\u2192\t\t\tstartLineNumber: this._startIndexes[index] & MAX_LINE_NUMBER,\n   253\u2192\t\t\tendLineNumber: this._endIndexes[index] & MAX_LINE_NUMBER,\n   254\u2192\t\t\ttype: this._types ? this._types[index] : undefined,\n   255\u2192\t\t\tisCollapsed: this.isCollapsed(index),\n   256\u2192\t\t\tsource: this.getSource(index)\n   257\u2192\t\t};\n   258\u2192\t}\n   259\u2192\n   260\u2192\tpublic static fromFoldRanges(ranges: FoldRange[]): FoldingRegions {\n   261\u2192\t\tconst rangesLength = ranges.length;\n   262\u2192\t\tconst startIndexes = new Uint32Array(rangesLength);\n   263\u2192\t\tconst endIndexes = new Uint32Array(rangesLength);\n   264\u2192\t\tlet types: Array<string | undefined> | undefined = [];\n   265\u2192\t\tlet gotTypes = false;\n   266\u2192\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < rangesLength; i++) {\n   267\u2192\t\t\tconst range = ranges[i];\n   268\u2192\t\t\tstartIndexes[i] = range.startLineNumber;\n   269\u2192\t\t\tendIndexes[i] = range.endLineNumber;\n   270\u2192\t\t\ttypes.push(range.type);\n   271\u2192\t\t\tif (range.type) {\n   272\u2192\t\t\t\tgotTypes = true;\n   273\u2192\t\t\t}\n   274\u2192\t\t}\n   275\u2192\t\tif (!gotTypes) {\n   276\u2192\t\t\ttypes = undefined;\n   277\u2192\t\t}\n   278\u2192\t\tconst regions = new FoldingRegions(startIndexes, endIndexes, types);\n   279\u2192\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < rangesLength; i++) {\n   280\u2192\t\t\tif (ranges[i].isCollapsed) {\n   281\u2192\t\t\t\tregions.setCollapsed(i, true);\n   282\u2192\t\t\t}\n   283\u2192\t\t\tregions.setSource(i, ranges[i].source);\n   284\u2192\t\t}\n   285\u2192\t\treturn regions;\n   286\u2192\t}\n   287\u2192\n   288\u2192\t/**\n   289\u2192\t * Two inputs, each a FoldingRegions or a FoldRange[], are merged.\n   290\u2192\t * Each input must be pre-sorted on startLineNumber.\n   291\u2192\t * The first list is assumed to always include all regions currently defined by range providers.\n   292\u2192\t * The second list only contains the previously collapsed and all manual ranges.\n   293\u2192\t * If the line position matches, the range of the new range is taken, and the range is no longer manual\n   294\u2192\t * When an entry in one list overlaps an entry in the other, the second list's entry \"wins\" and\n   295\u2192\t * overlapping entries in the first list are discarded.\n   296\u2192\t * Invalid entries are discarded. An entry is invalid if:\n   297\u2192\t * \t\tthe start and end line numbers aren't a valid range of line numbers,\n   298\u2192\t * \t\tit is out of sequence or has the same start line as a preceding entry,\n   299\u2192\t * \t\tit overlaps a preceding entry and is not fully contained by that entry.\n   300\u2192\t */\n   301\u2192\tpublic static sanitizeAndMerge(\n   302\u2192\t\trangesA: FoldingRegions | FoldRange[],\n   303\u2192\t\trangesB: FoldingRegions | FoldRange[],\n   304\u2192\t\tmaxLineNumber: number | undefined,\n   305\u2192\t\tselection?: SelectedLines\n   306\u2192\t): FoldRange[] {\n   307\u2192\n   308\u2192\t\tmaxLineNumber = maxLineNumber ?? Number.MAX_VALUE;\n   309\u2192\n   310\u2192\t\tconst getIndexedFunction = (r: FoldingRegions | FoldRange[], limit: number) => {\n   311\u2192\t\t\treturn Array.isArray(r)\n   312\u2192\t\t\t\t? ((i: number) => { return (i < limit) ? r[i] : undefined; })\n   313\u2192\t\t\t\t: ((i: number) => { return (i < limit) ? r.toFoldRange(i) : undefined; });\n   314\u2192\t\t};\n   315\u2192\t\tconst getA = getIndexedFunction(rangesA, rangesA.length);\n   316\u2192\t\tconst getB = getIndexedFunction(rangesB, rangesB.length);\n   317\u2192\t\tlet indexA = 0;\n   318\u2192\t\tlet indexB = 0;\n   319\u2192\t\tlet nextA = getA(0);\n   320\u2192\t\tlet nextB = getB(0);\n   321\u2192\n   322\u2192\t\tconst stackedRanges: FoldRange[] = [];\n   323\u2192\t\tlet topStackedRange: FoldRange | undefined;\n   324\u2192\t\tlet prevLineNumber = 0;\n   325\u2192\t\tconst resultRanges: FoldRange[] = [];\n   326\u2192\n   327\u2192\t\twhile (nextA || nextB) {\n   328\u2192\n   329\u2192\t\t\tlet useRange: FoldRange | undefined = undefined;\n   330\u2192\t\t\tif (nextB && (!nextA || nextA.startLineNumber >= nextB.startLineNumber)) {\n   331\u2192\t\t\t\tif (nextA && nextA.startLineNumber === nextB.startLineNumber) {\n   332\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (nextB.source === FoldSource.userDefined) {\n   333\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t// a user defined range (possibly unfolded)\n   334\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tuseRange = nextB;\n   335\u2192\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n   336\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t// a previously folded range or a (possibly unfolded) recovered range\n   337\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tuseRange = nextA;\n   338\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t// stays collapsed if the range still has the same number of lines or the selection is not in the range or after it\n   339\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tuseRange.isCollapsed = nextB.isCollapsed && (nextA.endLineNumber === nextB.endLineNumber || !selection?.startsInside(nextA.startLineNumber + 1, nextA.endLineNumber + 1));\n   340\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tuseRange.source = FoldSource.provider;\n   341\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   342\u2192\t\t\t\t\tnextA = getA(++indexA); // not necessary, just for speed\n   343\u2192\t\t\t\t} else {\n   344\u2192\t\t\t\t\tuseRange = nextB;\n   345\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (nextB.isCollapsed && nextB.source === FoldSource.provider) {\n   346\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t// a previously collapsed range\n   347\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tuseRange.source = FoldSource.recovered;\n   348\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   349\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   350\u2192\t\t\t\tnextB = getB(++indexB);\n   351\u2192\t\t\t} else {\n   352\u2192\t\t\t\t// nextA is next. The user folded B set takes precedence and we sometimes need to look\n   353\u2192\t\t\t\t// ahead in it to check for an upcoming conflict.\n   354\u2192\t\t\t\tlet scanIndex = indexB;\n   355\u2192\t\t\t\tlet prescanB = nextB;\n   356\u2192\t\t\t\twhile (true) {\n   357\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (!prescanB || prescanB.startLineNumber > nextA!.endLineNumber) {\n   358\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tuseRange = nextA;\n   359\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak; // no conflict, use this nextA\n   360\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   361\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (prescanB.source === FoldSource.userDefined && prescanB.endLineNumber > nextA!.endLineNumber) {\n   362\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t// we found a user folded range, it wins\n   363\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak; // without setting nextResult, so this nextA gets skipped\n   364\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   365\u2192\t\t\t\t\tprescanB = getB(++scanIndex);\n   366\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   367\u2192\t\t\t\tnextA = getA(++indexA);\n   368\u2192\t\t\t}\n   369\u2192\n   370\u2192\t\t\tif (useRange) {\n   371\u2192\t\t\t\twhile (topStackedRange\n   372\u2192\t\t\t\t\t&& topStackedRange.endLineNumber < useRange.startLineNumber) {\n   373\u2192\t\t\t\t\ttopStackedRange = stackedRanges.pop();\n   374\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   375\u2192\t\t\t\tif (useRange.endLineNumber > useRange.startLineNumber\n   376\u2192\t\t\t\t\t&& useRange.startLineNumber > prevLineNumber\n   377\u2192\t\t\t\t\t&& useRange.endLineNumber <= maxLineNumber\n   378\u2192\t\t\t\t\t&& (!topStackedRange\n   379\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t|| topStackedRange.endLineNumber >= useRange.endLineNumber)) {\n   380\u2192\t\t\t\t\tresultRanges.push(useRange);\n   381\u2192\t\t\t\t\tprevLineNumber = useRange.startLineNumber;\n   382\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (topStackedRange) {\n   383\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tstackedRanges.push(topStackedRange);\n   384\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   385\u2192\t\t\t\t\ttopStackedRange = useRange;\n   386\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   387\u2192\t\t\t}\n   388\u2192\n   389\u2192\t\t}\n   390\u2192\t\treturn resultRanges;\n   391\u2192\t}\n   392\u2192\n   393\u2192}\n   394\u2192\n   395\u2192export class FoldingRegion {\n   396\u2192\n   397\u2192\tconstructor(private readonly ranges: FoldingRegions, private index: number) {\n   398\u2192\t}\n   399\u2192\n   400\u2192\tpublic get startLineNumber() {\n   401\u2192\t\treturn this.ranges.getStartLineNumber(this.index);\n   402\u2192\t}\n   403\u2192\n   404\u2192\tpublic get endLineNumber() {\n   405\u2192\t\treturn this.ranges.getEndLineNumber(this.index);\n   406\u2192\t}\n   407\u2192\n   408\u2192\tpublic get regionIndex() {\n   409\u2192\t\treturn this.index;\n   410\u2192\t}\n   411\u2192\n   412\u2192\tpublic get parentIndex() {\n   413\u2192\t\treturn this.ranges.getParentIndex(this.index);\n   414\u2192\t}\n   415\u2192\n   416\u2192\tpublic get isCollapsed() {\n   417\u2192\t\treturn this.ranges.isCollapsed(this.index);\n   418\u2192\t}\n   419\u2192\n   420\u2192\tcontainedBy(range: ILineRange): boolean {\n   421\u2192\t\treturn range.startLineNumber <= this.startLineNumber && range.endLineNumber >= this.endLineNumber;\n   422\u2192\t}\n   423\u2192\tcontainsLine(lineNumber: number) {\n   424\u2192\t\treturn this.startLineNumber <= lineNumber && lineNumber <= this.endLineNumber;\n   425\u2192\t}\n   426\u2192\thidesLine(lineNumber: number) {\n   427\u2192\t\treturn this.startLineNumber < lineNumber && lineNumber <= this.endLineNumber;\n   428\u2192\t}\n   429\u2192}\n   430\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. RangeProvider } from './folding.js';\n    13\u2192\n    14\u2192const MAX_FOLDING_REGIONS_FOR_INDENT_DEFAULT = 5000;\n    15\u2192\n    16\u2192const ID_INDENT_PROVIDER = 'indent';\n    17\u2192\n    18\u2192export class IndentRangeProvider implements RangeProvider {\n    19\u2192\treadonly id = ID_INDENT_PROVIDER;\n    20\u2192\n    21\u2192\tconstructor(\n    22\u2192\t\tprivate readonly editorModel: ITextModel,\n    23\u2192\t\tprivate readonly languageConfigurationService: ILanguageConfigurationService,\n    24\u2192\t\tprivate readonly foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter\n    25\u2192\t) { }\n    26\u2192\n    27\u2192\tdispose() { }\n    28\u2192\n    29\u2192\tcompute(cancelationToken: CancellationToken,): Promise<FoldingRegions> {\n    30\u2192\t\tconst foldingRules = this.languageConfigurationService.getLanguageConfiguration(this.editorModel.getLanguageId()).foldingRules;\n    31\u2192\t\tconst offSide = foldingRules && !!foldingRules.offSide;\n    32\u2192\t\tconst markers = foldingRules && foldingRules.markers;\n    33\u2192\t\treturn Promise.resolve(computeRanges(this.editorModel, offSide, markers, this.foldingRangesLimit));\n    34\u2192\t}\n    35\u2192}\n    36\u2192\n    37\u2192// public only for testing\n    38\u2192export class RangesCollector {\n    39\u2192\tprivate readonly _startIndexes: number[];\n    40\u2192\tprivate readonly _endIndexes: number[];\n    41\u2192\tprivate readonly _indentOccurrences: number[];\n    42\u2192\tprivate _length: number;\n    43\u2192\tprivate readonly _foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter;\n    44\u2192\n    45\u2192\tconstructor(foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter) {\n    46\u2192\t\tthis._startIndexes = [];\n    47\u2192\t\tthis._endIndexes = [];\n    48\u2192\t\tthis._indentOccurrences = [];\n    49\u2192\t\tthis._length = 0;\n    50\u2192\t\tthis._foldingRangesLimit = foldingRangesLimit;\n    51\u2192\t}\n    52\u2192\n    53\u2192\tpublic insertFirst(startLineNumber: number, endLineNumber: number, indent: number) {\n    54\u2192\t\tif (startLineNumber > MAX_LINE_NUMBER || endLineNumber > MAX_LINE_NUMBER) {\n    55\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n    56\u2192\t\t}\n    57\u2192\t\tconst index = this._length;\n    58\u2192\t\tthis._startIndexes[index] = startLineNumber;\n    59\u2192\t\tthis._endIndexes[index] = endLineNumber;\n    60\u2192\t\tthis._length++;\n    61\u2192\t\tif (indent < 1000) {\n    62\u2192\t\t\tthis._indentOccurrences[indent] = (this._indentOccurrences[indent] || 0) + 1;\n    63\u2192\t\t}\n    64\u2192\t}\n    65\u2192\n    66\u2192\tpublic toIndentRanges(model: ITextModel) {\n    67\u2192\t\tconst limit = this._foldingRangesLimit.limit;\n    68\u2192\t\tif (this._length <= limit) {\n    69\u2192\t\t\tthis._foldingRangesLimit.update(this._length, false);\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192\t\t\t// reverse and create arrays of the exact length\n    72\u2192\t\t\tconst startIndexes = new Uint32Array(this._length);\n    73\u2192\t\t\tconst endIndexes = new Uint32Array(this._length);\n    74\u2192\t\t\tfor (let i = this._length - 1, k = 0; i >= 0; i--, k++) {\n    75\u2192\t\t\t\tstartIndexes[k] = this._startIndexes[i];\n    76\u2192\t\t\t\tendIndexes[k] = this._endIndexes[i];\n    77\u2192\t\t\t}\n    78\u2192\t\t\treturn new FoldingRegions(startIndexes, endIndexes);\n    79\u2192\t\t} else {\n    80\u2192\t\t\tthis._foldingRangesLimit.update(this._length, limit);\n    81\u2192\n    82\u2192\t\t\tlet entries = 0;\n    83\u2192\t\t\tlet maxIndent = this._indentOccurrences.length;\n    84\u2192\t\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < this._indentOccurrences.length; i++) {\n    85\u2192\t\t\t\tconst n = this._indentOccurrences[i];\n    86\u2192\t\t\t\tif (n) {\n    87\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (n + entries > limit) {\n    88\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tmaxIndent = i;\n    89\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n    90\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n    91\u2192\t\t\t\t\tentries += n;\n    92\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    93\u2192\t\t\t}\n    94\u2192\t\t\tconst tabSize = model.getOptions().tabSize;\n    95\u2192\t\t\t// reverse and create arrays of the exact length\n    96\u2192\t\t\tconst startIndexes = new Uint32Array(limit);\n    97\u2192\t\t\tconst endIndexes = new Uint32Array(limit);\n    98\u2192\t\t\tfor (let i = this._length - 1, k = 0; i >= 0; i--) {\n    99\u2192\t\t\t\tconst startIndex = this._startIndexes[i];\n   100\u2192\t\t\t\tconst lineContent = model.getLineContent(startIndex);\n   101\u2192\t\t\t\tconst indent = computeIndentLevel(lineContent, tabSize);\n   102\u2192\t\t\t\tif (indent < maxIndent || (indent === maxIndent && entries++ < limit)) {\n   103\u2192\t\t\t\t\tstartIndexes[k] = startIndex;\n   104\u2192\t\t\t\t\tendIndexes[k] = this._endIndexes[i];\n   105\u2192\t\t\t\t\tk++;\n   106\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   107\u2192\t\t\t}\n   108\u2192\t\t\treturn new FoldingRegions(startIndexes, endIndexes);\n   109\u2192\t\t}\n   110\u2192\n   111\u2192\t}\n   112\u2192}\n   113\u2192\n   114\u2192\n   115\u2192interface PreviousRegion {\n   116\u2192\tindent: number; // indent or -2 if a marker\n   117\u2192\tendAbove: number; // end line number for the region above\n   118\u2192\tline: number; // start line of the region. Only used for marker regions.\n   119\u2192}\n   120\u2192\n   121\u2192const foldingRangesLimitDefault: FoldingLimitReporter = {\n   122\u2192\tlimit: MAX_FOLDING_REGIONS_FOR_INDENT_DEFAULT,\n   123\u2192\tupdate: () => { }\n   124\u2192};\n   125\u2192\n   126\u2192export function computeRanges(model: ITextModel, offSide: boolean, markers?: FoldingMarkers, foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter = foldingRangesLimitDefault): FoldingRegions {\n   127\u2192\tconst tabSize = model.getOptions().tabSize;\n   128\u2192\tconst result = new RangesCollector(foldingRangesLimit);\n   129\u2192\n   130\u2192\tlet pattern: RegExp | undefined = undefined;\n   131\u2192\tif (markers) {\n   132\u2192\t\tpattern = new RegExp(`(${markers.start.source})|(?:${markers.end.source})`);\n   133\u2192\t}\n   134\u2192\n   135\u2192\tconst previousRegions: PreviousRegion[] = [];\n   136\u2192\tconst line = model.getLineCount() + 1;\n   137\u2192\tpreviousRegions.push({ indent: -1, endAbove: line, line }); // sentinel, to make sure there's at least one entry\n   138\u2192\n   139\u2192\tfor (let line = model.getLineCount(); line > 0; line--) {\n   140\u2192\t\tconst lineContent = model.getLineContent(line);\n   141\u2192\t\tconst indent = computeIndentLevel(lineContent, tabSize);\n   142\u2192\t\tlet previous = previousRegions[previousRegions.length - 1];\n   143\u2192\t\tif (indent === -1) {\n   144\u2192\t\t\tif (offSide) {\n   145\u2192\t\t\t\t// for offSide languages, empty lines are associated to the previous block\n   146\u2192\t\t\t\t// note: the next block is already written to the results, so this only\n   147\u2192\t\t\t\t// impacts the end position of the block before\n   148\u2192\t\t\t\tprevious.endAbove = line;\n   149\u2192\t\t\t}\n   150\u2192\t\t\tcontinue; // only whitespace\n   151\u2192\t\t}\n   152\u2192\t\tlet m;\n   153\u2192\t\tif (pattern && (m = lineContent.match(pattern))) {\n   154\u2192\t\t\t// folding pattern match\n   155\u2192\t\t\tif (m[1]) { // start pattern match\n   156\u2192\t\t\t\t// discard all regions until the folding pattern\n   157\u2192\t\t\t\tlet i = previousRegions.length - 1;\n   158\u2192\t\t\t\twhile (i > 0 && previousRegions[i].indent !== -2) {\n   159\u2192\t\t\t\t\ti--;\n   160\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   161\u2192\t\t\t\tif (i > 0) {\n   162\u2192\t\t\t\t\tpreviousRegions.length = i + 1;\n   163\u2192\t\t\t\t\tprevious = previousRegions[i];\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// new folding range from pattern, includes the end line\n   166\u2192\t\t\t\t\tresult.insertFirst(line, previous.line, indent);\n   167\u2192\t\t\t\t\tprevious.line = line;\n   168\u2192\t\t\t\t\tprevious.indent = indent;\n   169\u2192\t\t\t\t\tprevious.endAbove = line;\n   170\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n   171\u2192\t\t\t\t} else {\n   172\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// no end marker found, treat line as a regular line\n   173\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   174\u2192\t\t\t} else { // end pattern match\n   175\u2192\t\t\t\tpreviousRegions.push({ indent: -2, endAbove: line, line });\n   176\u2192\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n   177\u2192\t\t\t}\n   178\u2192\t\t}\n   179\u2192\t\tif (previous.indent > indent) {\n   180\u2192\t\t\t// discard all regions with larger indent\n   181\u2192\t\t\tdo {\n   182\u2192\t\t\t\tpreviousRegions.pop();\n   183\u2192\t\t\t\tprevious = previousRegions[previousRegions.length - 1];\n   184\u2192\t\t\t} while (previous.indent > indent);\n   185\u2192\n   186\u2192\t\t\t// new folding range\n   187\u2192\t\t\tconst endLineNumber = previous.endAbove - 1;\n   188\u2192\t\t\tif (endLineNumber - line >= 1) { // needs at east size 1\n   189\u2192\t\t\t\tresult.insertFirst(line, endLineNumber, indent);\n   190\u2192\t\t\t}\n   191\u2192\t\t}\n   192\u2192\t\tif (previous.indent === indent) {\n   193\u2192\t\t\tprevious.endAbove = line;\n   194\u2192\t\t} else { // previous.indent < indent\n   195\u2192\t\t\t// new region with a bigger indent\n   196\u2192\t\t\tpreviousRegions.push({ indent, endAbove: line, line });\n   197\u2192\t\t}\n   198\u2192\t}\n   199\u2192\treturn result.toIndentRanges(model);\n   200\u2192}\n   201\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
22. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/syntaxRangeProvider.ts"
}
Output
"     1\u2192/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     2\u2192 *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n     3\u2192 *  Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n     4\u2192 *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n     5\u2192\n     6\u2192import { CancellationToken } from '../../../../base/common/cancellation.js';\n     7\u2192import { onUnexpectedExternalError } from '../../../../base/common/errors.js';\n     8\u2192import { DisposableStore } from '../../../../base/common/lifecycle.js';\n     9\u2192import { ITextModel } from '../../../common/model.js';\n    10\u2192import { FoldingContext, FoldingRange, FoldingRangeProvider } from '../../../common/languages.js';\n    11\u2192import { FoldingLimitReporter, RangeProvider } from './folding.js';\n    12\u2192import { FoldingRegions, MAX_LINE_NUMBER } from './foldingRanges.js';\n    13\u2192\n    14\u2192export interface IFoldingRangeData extends FoldingRange {\n    15\u2192\trank: number;\n    16\u2192}\n    17\u2192\n    18\u2192const foldingContext: FoldingContext = {\n    19\u2192};\n    20\u2192\n    21\u2192const ID_SYNTAX_PROVIDER = 'syntax';\n    22\u2192\n    23\u2192export class SyntaxRangeProvider implements RangeProvider {\n    24\u2192\n    25\u2192\treadonly id = ID_SYNTAX_PROVIDER;\n    26\u2192\n    27\u2192\treadonly disposables: DisposableStore;\n    28\u2192\n    29\u2192\tconstructor(\n    30\u2192\t\tprivate readonly editorModel: ITextModel,\n    31\u2192\t\tprivate readonly providers: FoldingRangeProvider[],\n    32\u2192\t\treadonly handleFoldingRangesChange: () => void,\n    33\u2192\t\tprivate readonly foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter,\n    34\u2192\t\tprivate readonly fallbackRangeProvider: RangeProvider | undefined // used when all providers return null\n    35\u2192\t) {\n    36\u2192\t\tthis.disposables = new DisposableStore();\n    37\u2192\t\tif (fallbackRangeProvider) {\n    38\u2192\t\t\tthis.disposables.add(fallbackRangeProvider);\n    39\u2192\t\t}\n    40\u2192\n    41\u2192\t\tfor (const provider of providers) {\n    42\u2192\t\t\tif (typeof provider.onDidChange === 'function') {\n    43\u2192\t\t\t\tthis.disposables.add(provider.onDidChange(handleFoldingRangesChange));\n    44\u2192\t\t\t}\n    45\u2192\t\t}\n    46\u2192\t}\n    47\u2192\n    48\u2192\tcompute(cancellationToken: CancellationToken): Promise<FoldingRegions | null> {\n    49\u2192\t\treturn collectSyntaxRanges(this.providers, this.editorModel, cancellationToken).then(ranges => {\n    50\u2192\t\t\tif (ranges) {\n    51\u2192\t\t\t\tconst res = sanitizeRanges(ranges, this.foldingRangesLimit);\n    52\u2192\t\t\t\treturn res;\n    53\u2192\t\t\t}\n    54\u2192\t\t\treturn this.fallbackRangeProvider?.compute(cancellationToken) ?? null;\n    55\u2192\t\t});\n    56\u2192\t}\n    57\u2192\n    58\u2192\tdispose() {\n    59\u2192\t\tthis.disposables.dispose();\n    60\u2192\t}\n    61\u2192}\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192function collectSyntaxRanges(providers: FoldingRangeProvider[], model: ITextModel, cancellationToken: CancellationToken): Promise<IFoldingRangeData[] | null> {\n    64\u2192\tlet rangeData: IFoldingRangeData[] | null = null;\n    65\u2192\tconst promises = providers.map((provider, i) => {\n    66\u2192\t\treturn Promise.resolve(provider.provideFoldingRanges(model, foldingContext, cancellationToken)).then(ranges => {\n    67\u2192\t\t\tif (cancellationToken.isCancellationRequested) {\n    68\u2192\t\t\t\treturn;\n    69\u2192\t\t\t}\n    70\u2192\t\t\tif (Array.isArray(ranges)) {\n    71\u2192\t\t\t\tif (!Array.isArray(rangeData)) {\n    72\u2192\t\t\t\t\trangeData = [];\n    73\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    74\u2192\t\t\t\tconst nLines = model.getLineCount();\n    75\u2192\t\t\t\tfor (const r of ranges) {\n    76\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (r.start > 0 && r.end > r.start && r.end <= nLines) {\n    77\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\trangeData.push({ start: r.start, end: r.end, rank: i, kind: r.kind });\n    78\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n    79\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    80\u2192\t\t\t}\n    81\u2192\t\t}, onUnexpectedExternalError);\n    82\u2192\t});\n    83\u2192\treturn Promise.all(promises).then(_ => {\n    84\u2192\t\treturn rangeData;\n    85\u2192\t});\n    86\u2192}\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192class RangesCollector {\n    89\u2192\tprivate readonly _startIndexes: number[];\n    90\u2192\tprivate readonly _endIndexes: number[];\n    91\u2192\tprivate readonly _nestingLevels: number[];\n    92\u2192\tprivate readonly _nestingLevelCounts: number[];\n    93\u2192\tprivate readonly _types: Array<string | undefined>;\n    94\u2192\tprivate _length: number;\n    95\u2192\tprivate readonly _foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter;\n    96\u2192\n    97\u2192\tconstructor(foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter) {\n    98\u2192\t\tthis._startIndexes = [];\n    99\u2192\t\tthis._endIndexes = [];\n   100\u2192\t\tthis._nestingLevels = [];\n   101\u2192\t\tthis._nestingLevelCounts = [];\n   102\u2192\t\tthis._types = [];\n   103\u2192\t\tthis._length = 0;\n   104\u2192\t\tthis._foldingRangesLimit = foldingRangesLimit;\n   105\u2192\t}\n   106\u2192\n   107\u2192\tpublic add(startLineNumber: number, endLineNumber: number, type: string | undefined, nestingLevel: number) {\n   108\u2192\t\tif (startLineNumber > MAX_LINE_NUMBER || endLineNumber > MAX_LINE_NUMBER) {\n   109\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   110\u2192\t\t}\n   111\u2192\t\tconst index = this._length;\n   112\u2192\t\tthis._startIndexes[index] = startLineNumber;\n   113\u2192\t\tthis._endIndexes[index] = endLineNumber;\n   114\u2192\t\tthis._nestingLevels[index] = nestingLevel;\n   115\u2192\t\tthis._types[index] = type;\n   116\u2192\t\tthis._length++;\n   117\u2192\t\tif (nestingLevel < 30) {\n   118\u2192\t\t\tthis._nestingLevelCounts[nestingLevel] = (this._nestingLevelCounts[nestingLevel] || 0) + 1;\n   119\u2192\t\t}\n   120\u2192\t}\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192\tpublic toIndentRanges() {\n   123\u2192\t\tconst limit = this._foldingRangesLimit.limit;\n   124\u2192\t\tif (this._length <= limit) {\n   125\u2192\t\t\tthis._foldingRangesLimit.update(this._length, false);\n   126\u2192\n   127\u2192\t\t\tconst startIndexes = new Uint32Array(this._length);\n   128\u2192\t\t\tconst endIndexes = new Uint32Array(this._length);\n   129\u2192\t\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < this._length; i++) {\n   130\u2192\t\t\t\tstartIndexes[i] = this._startIndexes[i];\n   131\u2192\t\t\t\tendIndexes[i] = this._endIndexes[i];\n   132\u2192\t\t\t}\n   133\u2192\t\t\treturn new FoldingRegions(startIndexes, endIndexes, this._types);\n   134\u2192\t\t} else {\n   135\u2192\t\t\tthis._foldingRangesLimit.update(this._length, limit);\n   136\u2192\n   137\u2192\t\t\tlet entries = 0;\n   138\u2192\t\t\tlet maxLevel = this._nestingLevelCounts.length;\n   139\u2192\t\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < this._nestingLevelCounts.length; i++) {\n   140\u2192\t\t\t\tconst n = this._nestingLevelCounts[i];\n   141\u2192\t\t\t\tif (n) {\n   142\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (n + entries > limit) {\n   143\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tmaxLevel = i;\n   144\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n   145\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   146\u2192\t\t\t\t\tentries += n;\n   147\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   148\u2192\t\t\t}\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192\t\t\tconst startIndexes = new Uint32Array(limit);\n   151\u2192\t\t\tconst endIndexes = new Uint32Array(limit);\n   152\u2192\t\t\tconst types: Array<string | undefined> = [];\n   153\u2192\t\t\tfor (let i = 0, k = 0; i < this._length; i++) {\n   154\u2192\t\t\t\tconst level = this._nestingLevels[i];\n   155\u2192\t\t\t\tif (level < maxLevel || (level === maxLevel && entries++ < limit)) {\n   156\u2192\t\t\t\t\tstartIndexes[k] = this._startIndexes[i];\n   157\u2192\t\t\t\t\tendIndexes[k] = this._endIndexes[i];\n   158\u2192\t\t\t\t\ttypes[k] = this._types[i];\n   159\u2192\t\t\t\t\tk++;\n   160\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   161\u2192\t\t\t}\n   162\u2192\t\t\treturn new FoldingRegions(startIndexes, endIndexes, types);\n   163\u2192\t\t}\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192\t}\n   166\u2192\n   167\u2192}\n   168\u2192\n   169\u2192export function sanitizeRanges(rangeData: IFoldingRangeData[], foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter): FoldingRegions {\n   170\u2192\tconst sorted = rangeData.sort((d1, d2) => {\n   171\u2192\t\tlet diff = d1.start - d2.start;\n   172\u2192\t\tif (diff === 0) {\n   173\u2192\t\t\tdiff = d1.rank - d2.rank;\n   174\u2192\t\t}\n   175\u2192\t\treturn diff;\n   176\u2192\t});\n   177\u2192\tconst collector = new RangesCollector(foldingRangesLimit);\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192\tlet top: IFoldingRangeData | undefined = undefined;\n   180\u2192\tconst previous: IFoldingRangeData[] = [];\n   181\u2192\tfor (const entry of sorted) {\n   182\u2192\t\tif (!top) {\n   183\u2192\t\t\ttop = entry;\n   184\u2192\t\t\tcollector.add(entry.start, entry.end, entry.kind && entry.kind.value, previous.length);\n   185\u2192\t\t} else {\n   186\u2192\t\t\tif (entry.start > top.start) {\n   187\u2192\t\t\t\tif (entry.end <= top.end) {\n   188\u2192\t\t\t\t\tprevious.push(top);\n   189\u2192\t\t\t\t\ttop = entry;\n   190\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcollector.add(entry.start, entry.end, entry.kind && entry.kind.value, previous.length);\n   191\u2192\t\t\t\t} else {\n   192\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (entry.start > top.end) {\n   193\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tdo {\n   194\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttop = previous.pop();\n   195\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t} while (top && entry.start > top.end);\n   196\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tif (top) {\n   197\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tprevious.push(top);\n   198\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   199\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\ttop = entry;\n   200\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   201\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcollector.add(entry.start, entry.end, entry.kind && entry.kind.value, previous.length);\n   202\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   203\u2192\t\t\t}\n   204\u2192\t\t}\n   205\u2192\t}\n   206\u2192\treturn collector.toIndentRanges();\n   207\u2192}\n   208\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
23. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "find /workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser -type f -name \"*.ts\" | head -20",
  "description": "List TypeScript files in folding directory"

FoldingAction<void> {\n  1107\u2192\tconstructor() {\n  1108\u2192\t\tsuper({\n  1109\u2192\t\t\tid: 'editor.gotoNextFold',\n  1110\u2192\t\t\tlabel: nls.localize2('gotoNextFold.label', \"Go to Next ICodeEditor): void {\n  1120\u2192\t\tconst selectedLines = this.getSelectedLines(editor);\n  1121\u2192\t\tif (selectedLines.length > 0) {\n  1122\u2192\t\t\tconst startLineNumber = getNextFoldLine(selectedLines[0], foldingModel);\n  1123\u2192\t\t\tif (startLineNumber !== null) {\n  1124\u2192\t\t\t\teditor.setSelection({\n  1125\u2192\t\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: startLineNumber,\n  1126\u2192\t\t\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n  1127\u2192\t\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: startLineNumber,\n  1128\u2192\t\t\t\t\tendColumn: 1\n  1129\u2192\t\t\t\t});\n  1130\u2192\t\t\t}\n  1131\u2192\t\t}\n  1132\u2192\t}\n  1133\u2192}\n  1134\u2192\n  1135\u2192class FoldRangeFromSelectionAction extends FoldingAction<void> {\n  1136\u2192\n  1137\u2192\tconstructor() {\n  1138\u2192\t\tsuper({\n  1139\u2192\t\t\tid: 'editor.createFoldingRangeFromSelection',\n  1140\u2192\t\t\tlabel: nls.localize2('createManualFoldRange.label', \"Create Folding Range from Selection\"),\n  1141\u2192\t\t\tprecondition: CONTEXT_FOLDING_ENABLED,\n  1142\u2192\t\t\tkbOpts: {\n  1143\u2192\t\t\t\tkbExpr: EditorContextKeys.editorTextFocus,\n  1144\u2192\t\t\t\tprimary: KeyChord(KeyMod.CtrlCmd | KeyCode.KeyK, KeyMod.CtrlCmd | KeyCode.Comma),\n  1145\u2192\t\t\t\tweight: KeybindingWeight.EditorContrib\n  1146\u2192\t\t\t}\n  1147\u2192\t\t});\n  1148\u2192\t}\n  1149\u2192\n  1150\u2192\tinvoke(_foldingController: FoldingController, foldingModel: FoldingModel, editor: ICodeEditor): void {\n  1151\u2192\t\tconst collapseRanges: FoldRange[] = [];\n  1152\u2192\t\tconst selections = editor.getSelections();\n  1153\u2192\t\tif (selections) {\n  1154\u2192\t\t\tfor (const selection of selections) {\n  1155\u2192\t\t\t\tlet endLineNumber = selection.endLineNumber;\n  1156\u2192\t\t\t\tif (selection.endColumn === 1) {\n  1157\u2192\t\t\t\t\t--endLineNumber;\n  1158\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n  1159\u2192\t\t\t\tif (endLineNumber > selection.startLineNumber) {\n  1160\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcollapseRanges.push({\n  1161\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: selection.startLineNumber,\n  1162\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: endLineNumber,\n  1163\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: undefined,\n  1164\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tisCollapsed: true,\n  1165\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tsource: FoldSource.userDefined\n  1166\u2192\t\t\t\t\t});\n  1167\u2192\t\t\t\t\teditor.setSelection({\n  1168\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: selection.startLineNumber,\n  1169\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tstartColumn: 1,\n  1170\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: selection.startLineNumber,\n  1171\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tendColumn: 1\n  1172\u2192\t\t\t\t\t});\n  1173\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n  1174\u2192\t\t\t}\n  1175\u2192\t\t\tif (collapseRanges.length > 0) {\n  1176\u2192\t\t\t\tcollapseRanges.sort((a, b) => {\n  1177\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn a.startLineNumber - b.startLineNumber;\n  1178\u2192\t\t\t\t});\n  1179\u2192\t\t\t\tconst newRanges = FoldingRegions.sanitizeAndMerge(foldingModel.regions, collapseRanges, editor.getModel()?.getLineCount());\n  1180\u2192\t\t\t\tfoldingModel.updatePost(FoldingRegions.fromFoldRanges(newRanges));\n  1181\u2192\t\t\t}\n  1182\u2192\t\t}\n  1183\u2192\t}\n  1184\u2192}\n  1185\u2192\n  1186\u2192class RemoveFoldRangeFromSelectionAction extends FoldingAction<void> {\n  1187\u2192\n  1188\u2192\tconstructor() {\n  1189\u2192\t\tsuper({\n  1190\u2192\t\t\tid: 'editor.removeManualFoldingRanges',\n  1191\u2192\t\t\tlabel: nls.localize2('removeManualFoldingRanges.label', \"Remove Manual Folding Ranges\"),\n  1192\u2192\t\t\tprecondition: CONTEXT_FOLDING_ENABLED,\n  1193\u2192\t\t\tkbOpts: {\n  1194\u2192\t\t\t\tkbExpr: EditorContextKeys.editorTextFocus,\n  1195\u2192\t\t\t\tprimary: KeyChord(KeyMod.CtrlCmd | KeyCode.KeyK, KeyMod.CtrlCmd | KeyCode.Period),\n  1196\u2192\t\t\t\tweight: KeybindingWeight.EditorContrib\n  1197\u2192\t\t\t}\n  1198\u2192\t\t});\n  1199\u2192\t}\n  1200\u2192\n  1201\u2192\tinvoke(foldingController: FoldingController, foldingModel: FoldingModel, editor: ICodeEditor): void {\n  1202\u2192\t\tconst selections = editor.getSelections();\n  1203\u2192\t\tif (selections) {\n  1204\u2192\t\t\tconst ranges: ILineRange[] = [];\n  1205\u2192\t\t\tfor (const selection of selections) {\n  1206\u2192\t\t\t\tconst { startLineNumber, endLineNumber } = selection;\n  1207\u2192\t\t\t\tranges.push(endLineNumber >= startLineNumber ? { startLineNumber, endLineNumber } : { endLineNumber, startLineNumber });\n  1208\u2192\t\t\t}\n  1209\u2192\t\t\tfoldingModel.removeManualRanges(ranges);\n  1210\u2192\t\t\tfoldingController.triggerFoldingModelChanged();\n  1211\u2192\t\t}\n  1212\u2192\t}\n  1213\u2192}\n  1214\u2192\n  1215\u2192\n  1216\u2192class ToggleImportFoldAction extends FoldingAction<void> {\n  1217\u2192\n  1218\u2192\tconstructor() {\n  1219\u2192\t\tsuper({\n  1220\u2192\t\t\tid: 'editor.toggleImportFold',\n  1221\u2192\t\t\tlabel: nls.localize2('toggleImportFold.label', \"Toggle Import Fold\"),\n  1222\u2192\t\t\tprecondition: CONTEXT_FOLDING_ENABLED,\n  1223\u2192\t\t\tkbOpts: {\n  1224\u2192\t\t\t\tkbExpr: EditorContextKeys.editorTextFocus,\n  1225\u2192\t\t\t\tweight: KeybindingWeight.EditorContrib\n  1226\u2192\t\t\t}\n  1227\u2192\t\t});\n  1228\u2192\t}\n  1229\u2192\n  1230\u2192\tasync invoke(foldingController: FoldingController, foldingModel: FoldingModel): Promise<void> {\n  1231\u2192\t\tconst regionsToToggle: FoldingRegion[] = [];\n  1232\u2192\t\tconst regions = foldingModel.regions;\n  1233\u2192\t\tfor (let i = regions.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n  1234\u2192\t\t\tif (regions.getType(i) === FoldingRangeKind.Imports.value) {\n  1235\u2192\t\t\t\tregionsToToggle.push(regions.toRegion(i));\n  1236\u2192\t\t\t}\n  1237\u2192\t\t}\n  1238\u2192\t\tfoldingModel.toggleCollapseState(regionsToToggle);\n  1239\u2192\t\tfoldingController.triggerFoldingModelChanged();\n  1240\u2192\t}\n  1241\u2192}\n  1242\u2192\n  1243\u2192\n  1244\u2192registerEditorContribution(FoldingController.ID, FoldingController, EditorContributionInstantiation.Eager); // eager because it uses `saveViewState`/`restoreViewState`\n  1245\u2192registerEditorAction(UnfoldAction);\n  1246\u2192registerEditorAction(UnFoldRecursivelyAction);\n  1247\u2192registerEditorAction(FoldAction);\n  1248\u2192registerEditorAction(FoldRecursivelyAction);\n  1249\u2192registerEditorAction(ToggleFoldRecursivelyAction);\n  1250\u2192registerEditorAction(FoldAllAction);\n  1251\u2192registerEditorAction(UnfoldAllAction);\n  1252\u2192registerEditorAction(FoldAllBlockCommentsAction);\n  1253\u2192registerEditorAction(FoldAllRegionsAction);\n  1254\u2192registerEditorAction(UnfoldAllRegionsAction);\n  1255\u2192registerEditorAction(FoldAllExceptAction);\n  1256\u2192registerEditorAction(UnfoldAllExceptAction);\n  1257\u2192registerEditorAction(ToggleFoldAction);\n  1258\u2192registerEditorAction(GotoParentFoldAction);\n  1259\u2192registerEditorAction(GotoPreviousFoldAction);\n  1260\u2192registerEditorAction(GotoNextFoldAction);\n  1261\u2192registerEditorAction(FoldRangeFromSelectionAction);\n  1262\u2192registerEditorAction(RemoveFoldRangeFromSelectionAction);\n  1263\u2192registerEditorAction(ToggleImportFoldAction);\n  1264\u2192\n  1265\u2192for (let i = 1; i <= 7; i++) {\n  1266\u2192\tregisterInstantiatedEditorAction(\n  1267\u2192\t\tnew 1280\u2192CommandsRegistry.registerCommand('_executeFoldingRangeProvider', async function (accessor, ...args) {\n  1281\u2192\tconst [resource] = args;\n  1282\u2192\tif (!(resource instanceof URI)) {\n  1283\u2192\t\tthrow illegalArgument();\n  1284\u2192\t}\n  1285\u2192\n  1286\u2192\tconst languageFeaturesService = accessor.get(ILanguageFeaturesService);\n  1287\u2192\n  1288\u2192\tconst model = accessor.get(IModelService).getModel(resource);\n  1289\u2192\tif (!model) {\n  1290\u2192\t\tthrow illegalArgument();\n  1291\u2192\t}\n  1292\u2192\n  1293\u2192\tconst configurationService = accessor.get(IConfigurationService);\n  1294\u2192\tif (!configurationService.getValue('editor.folding', { resource })) {\n  1295\u2192\t\treturn [];\n  1296\u2192\t}\n  1297\u2192\n IEditorProgressService } from '../../../../platform/progress/common/progress.js';\n    38\u2192import { getDeclarationsAtPosition, getDefinitionsAtPosition, getImplementationsAtPosition, getReferencesAtPosition, getTypeDefinitionsAtPosition } from './goToSymbol.js';\n    39\u2192import { IWordAtPosition } from '../../../common/core/wordHelper.js';\n    40\u2192import { ILanguageFeaturesService } from '../../../common/services/languageFeatures.js';\n    41\u2192import { Iterable } from '../../../../base/common/iterator.js';\n    42\u2192import { IsWebContext } from '../../../../platform/contextkey/common/contextkeys.js';\n    43\u2192\n    44\u2192MenuRegistry.appendMenuItem(MenuId.EditorContext, {\n    45\u2192\tsubmenu: MenuId.EditorContextPeek,\n    46\u2192\ttitle: nls.localize('peek.submenu', \"Peek\"),\n    47\u2192\tgroup: 'navigation',\n    48\u2192\torder: 100\n    49\u2192} satisfies ISubmenuItem);\n    50\u2192\n    51\u2192export interface SymbolNavigationActionConfig {\n    52\u2192\topenToSide: boolean;\n    53\u2192\topenInPeek: boolean;\n    54\u2192\tmuteMessage: boolean;\n    55\u2192}\n    56\u2192\n    57\u2192export class SymbolNavigationAnchor {\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192\tstatic is(thing: any): thing is SymbolNavigationAnchor {\n    60\u2192\t\tif (!thing || typeof thing !== 'object') {\n    61\u2192\t\t\treturn false;\n    62\u2192\t\t}\n    63\u2192\t\tif (thing instanceof SymbolNavigationAnchor) {\n    64\u2192\t\t\treturn true;\n    65\u2192\t\t}\n    66\u2192\t\tif (corePosition.Position.isIPosition((<SymbolNavigationAnchor>thing).position) && (<SymbolNavigationAnchor>thing).model) {\n    67\u2192\t\t\treturn true;\n    68\u2192\t\t}\n    69\u2192\t\treturn false;\n    70\u2192\t}\n    71\u2192\n    72\u2192\tconstructor(readonly model: ITextModel, readonly position: corePosition.Position) { }\n    73\u2192}\n    74\u2192\n    75\u2192export abstract class SymbolNavigationAction extends EditorAction2 {\n    76\u2192\n    77\u2192\tprivate static _allSymbolNavigationCommands = new Map<string, SymbolNavigationAction>();\n    78\u2192\tprivate static _activeAlternativeCommands = new Set<string>();\n    79\u2192\n    80\u2192\tstatic all(): IterableIterator<SymbolNavigationAction> {\n    81\u2192\t\treturn SymbolNavigationAction._allSymbolNavigationCommands.values();\n    82\u2192\t}\n    83\u2192\n    84\u2192\tprivate static _patchConfig(opts: IAction2Options & IAction2F1RequiredOptions): IAction2Options {\n    85\u2192\t\tconst result = { ...opts, f1: true };\n    86\u2192\t\t// patch context menu when clause\n    87\u2192\t\tif (result.menu) {\n    88\u2192\t\t\tfor (const item of Iterable.wrap(result.menu)) {\n    89\u2192\t\t\t\tif (item.id === MenuId.EditorContext || item.id === MenuId.EditorContextPeek) {\n    90\u2192\t\t\t\t\titem.when = ContextKeyExpr.and(opts.precondition, item.when);\n    91\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    92\u2192\t\t\t}\n    93\u2192\t\t}\n    94\u2192\t\treturn <typeof opts>result;\n    95\u2192\t}\n    96\u2192\n    97\u2192\treadonly configuration: SymbolNavigationActionConfig;\n    98\u2192\n    99\u2192\tconstructor(configuration: SymbolNavigationActionConfig, opts: IAction2Options & IAction2F1RequiredOptions) {\n   100\u2192\t\tsuper(SymbolNavigationAction._patchConfig(opts));\n   101\u2192\t\tthis.configuration = configuration;\n   102\u2192\t\tSymbolNavigationAction._allSymbolNavigationCommands.set(opts.id, this);\n   103\u2192\t}\n   104\u2192\n   105\u2192\toverride runEditorCommand(accessor: ServicesAccessor, editor: ICodeEditor, arg?: SymbolNavigationAnchor | unknown, range?: Range): Promise<void> {\n   106\u2192\t\tif (!editor.hasModel()) {\n   107\u2192\t\t\treturn Promise.resolve(undefined);\n   108\u2192\t\t}\n   109\u2192\t\tconst notificationService = accessor.get(INotificationService);\n   110\u2192\t\tconst editorService = accessor.get(ICodeEditorService);\n   111\u2192\t\tconst progressService = accessor.get(IEditorProgressService);\n   112\u2192\t\tconst symbolNavService = accessor.get(ISymbolNavigationService);\n   113\u2192\t\tconst languageFeaturesService = accessor.get(ILanguageFeaturesService);\n   114\u2192\t\tconst instaService = accessor.get(IInstantiationService);\n   115\u2192\n   116\u2192\t\tconst model = editor.getModel();\n   117\u2192\t\tconst position = editor.getPosition();\n   118\u2192\t\tconst anchor = SymbolNavigationAnchor.is(arg) ? arg : new SymbolNavigationAnchor(model, position);\n   119\u2192\n   120\u2192\t\tconst cts = new EditorStateCancellationTokenSource(editor, CodeEditorStateFlag.Value | CodeEditorStateFlag.Position);\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192\t\tconst promise = raceCancellation(this._getLocationModel(languageFeaturesService, anchor.model, anchor.position, cts.token), cts.token).then(async references => {\n   123\u2192\n   124\u2192\t\t\tif (!references || cts.token.isCancellationRequested) {\n   125\u2192\t\t\t\treturn;\n   126\u2192\t\t\t}\n   127\u2192\n   128\u2192\t\t\talert(references.ariaMessage);\n   129\u2192\n   130\u2192\t\t\tlet altAction: SymbolNavigationAction | null | undefined;\n   131\u2192\t\t\tif (references.referenceAt(model.uri, position)) {\n   132\u2192\t\t\t\tconst altActionId = this._getAlternativeCommand(editor);\n   133\u2192\t\t\t\tif (!SymbolNavigationAction._activeAlternativeCommands.has(altActionId) && SymbolNavigationAction._allSymbolNavigationCommands.has(altActionId)) {\n   134\u2192\t\t\t\t\taltAction = SymbolNavigationAction._allSymbolNavigationCommands.get(altActionId)!;\n   135\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   136\u2192\t\t\t}\n   137\u2192\n   138\u2192\t\t\tconst referenceCount = references.references.length;\n   139\u2192\n   140\u2192\t\t\tif (referenceCount === 0) {\n   141\u2192\t\t\t\t// no result -> show message\n   142\u2192\t\t\t\tif (!this.configuration.muteMessage) {\n   143\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst info = model.getWordAtPosition(position);\n   144\u2192\t\t\t\t\tMessageController.get(editor)?.showMessage(this._getNoResultFoundMessage(info), position);\n   145\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   146\u2192\t\t\t} else if (referenceCount === 1 && altAction) {\n   147\u2192\t\t\t\t// already at the only result, run alternative\n   148\u2192\t\t\t\tSymbolNavigationAction._activeAlternativeCommands.add(this.desc.id);\n   149\u2192\t\t\t\tinstaService.invokeFunction((accessor) => altAction.runEditorCommand(accessor, editor, arg, range).finally(() => {\n   150\u2192\t\t\t\t\tSymbolNavigationAction._activeAlternativeCommands.delete(this.desc.id);\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

Input

  "file_path": "/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/test/browser/indentRangeProvider.test.ts",

  "offset": 1

Output
"     1\u2192/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     2\u2192 *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n     3\u2192 *  Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n     4\u2192 *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n     5\u2192\n     6\u2192import assert from 'assert';\n     7\u2192import { ensureNoDisposablesAreLeakedInTestSuite } from '../../../../../base/test/common/utils.js';\n     8\u2192import { FoldingMarkers } from '../../../../common/languages/languageConfiguration.js';\n     9\u2192import { computeRanges } from '../../browser/indentRangeProvider.js';\n    10\u2192import { createTextModel } from '../../../../test/common/testTextModel.js';\n    11\u2192\n    12\u2192interface ExpectedIndentRange {\n    13\u2192\tstartLineNumber: number;\n    14\u2192\tendLineNumber: number;\n    15\u2192\tparentIndex: number;\n    16\u2192}\n    17\u2192\n    18\u2192function assertRanges(lines: string[], expected: ExpectedIndentRange[], offside: boolean, markers?: FoldingMarkers): void {\n    19\u2192\tconst model = createTextModel(lines.join('\\n'));\n    20\u2192\tconst actual = computeRanges(model, offside, markers);\n    21\u2192\n    22\u2192\tconst actualRanges: ExpectedIndentRange[] = [];\n    23\u2192\tfor (let i = 0; i < actual.length; i++) {\n    24\u2192\t\tactualRanges[i] = r(actual.getStartLineNumber(i), actual.getEndLineNumber(i), actual.getParentIndex(i));\n    25\u2192\t}\n    26\u2192\tassert.deepStrictEqual(actualRanges, expected);\n    27\u2192\tmodel.dispose();\n    28\u2192}\n    29\u2192\n    30\u2192function r(startLineNumber: number, endLineNumber: number, parentIndex: number, marker = false): ExpectedIndentRange {\n    31\u2192\treturn { startLineNumber, endLineNumber, parentIndex };\n    32\u2192}\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192suite('Indentation Folding', () => {\n    35\u2192\tensureNoDisposablesAreLeakedInTestSuite();\n    36\u2192\ttest('Fold one level', () => {\n    37\u2192\t\tconst range = [\n    38\u2192\t\t\t'A',\n    39\u2192\t\t\t'  A',\n    40\u2192\t\t\t'  A',\n    41\u2192\t\t\t'  A'\n    42\u2192\t\t];\n    43\u2192\t\tassertRanges(range, [r(1, 4, -1)], true);\n    44\u2192\t\tassertRanges(range, [r(1, 4, -1)], false);\n    45\u2192\t});\n    46\u2192\n    47\u2192\ttest('Fold two levels', () => {\n    48\u2192\t\tconst range = [\n    49\u2192\t\t\t'A',\n    50\u2192\t\t\t'  A',\n    51\u2192\t\t\t'  A',\n    52\u2192\t\t\t'    A',\n    53\u2192\t\t\t'    A'\n    54\u2192\t\t];\n    55\u2192\t\tassertRanges(range, [r(1, 5, -1), r(3, 5, 0)], true);\n    56\u2192\t\tassertRanges(range, [r(1, 5, -1), r(3, 5, 0)], false);\n    57\u2192\t});\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192\ttest('Fold three levels', () => {\n    60\u2192\t\tconst range = [\n    61\u2192\t\t\t'A',\n    62\u2192\t\t\t'  A',\n    63\u2192\t\t\t'    A',\n    64\u2192\t\t\t'      A',\n    65\u2192\t\t\t'A'\n    66\u2192\t\t];\n    67\u2192\t\tassertRanges(range, [r(1, 4, -1), r(2, 4, 0), r(3, 4, 1)], true);\n    68\u2192\t\tassertRanges(range, [r(1, 4, -1), r(2, 4, 0), r(3, 4, 1)], false);\n    69\u2192\t});\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192\ttest('Fold decreasing indent', () => {\n    72\u2192\t\tconst range = [\n    73\u2192\t\t\t'    A',\n    74\u2192\t\t\t'  A',\n    75\u2192\t\t\t'A'\n    76\u2192\t\t];\n    77\u2192\t\tassertRanges(range, [], true);\n    78\u2192\t\tassertRanges(range, [], false);\n    79\u2192\t});\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192\ttest('Fold Java', () => {\n    82\u2192\t\tassertRanges([\n    83\u2192\t\t/* 1*/\t'class A {',\n    84\u2192\t\t/* 2*/\t'  void foo() {',\n    85\u2192\t\t/* 3*/\t'    console.log();',\n    86\u2192\t\t/* 4*/\t'    console.log();',\n    87\u2192\t\t/* 5*/\t'  }',\n    88\u2192\t\t/* 6*/\t'',\n    89\u2192\t\t/* 7*/\t'  void bar() {',\n    90\u2192\t\t/* 8*/\t'    console.log();',\n    91\u2192\t\t/* 9*/\t'  }',\n    92\u2192\t\t/*10*/\t'}',\n    93\u2192\t\t/*11*/\t'interface B {',\n    94\u2192\t\t/*12*/\t'  void bar();',\n    95\u2192\t\t/*13*/\t'}',\n    96\u2192\t\t], [r(1, 9, -1), r(2, 4, 0), r(7, 8, 0), r(11, 12, -1)], false);\n    97\u2192\t});\n    98\u2192\n    99\u2192\ttest('Fold Javadoc', () => {\n   100\u2192\t\tassertRanges([\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

"     1\u2192/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     2\u2192 *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n     4\u2192 *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n     5\u2192\n     6\u2192import { Codicon } from '../../../../base/common/codicons.js';\n     7\u2192import { ICodeEditor } from '../../../browser/editorBrowser.js';\n     8\u2192import { IModelDecorationOptions, IModelDecorationsChangeAccessor, MinimapPosition, TrackedRangeStickiness } from '../../../common/model.js';\n     9\u2192import { ModelDecorationOptions } from '../../../common/model/textModel.js';\n    10\u2192import { IDecorationProvider } from './foldingModel.js';\n    11\u2192import { localize } from '../../../../nls.js';\n    12\u2192import { editorSelectionBackground, iconForeground, registerColor, transparent } from '../../../../platform/theme/common/colorRegistry.js';\n    13\u2192import { registerIcon } from '../../../../platform/theme/common/iconRegistry.js';\n    14\u2192import { themeColorFromId } from '../../../../platform/theme/common/themeService.js';\n    15\u2192import { ThemeIcon } from '../../../../base/common/themables.js';\n    16\u2192\n    17\u2192const foldBackground = registerColor('editor.foldBackground', { light: transparent(editorSelectionBackground, 0.3), dark: transparent(editorSelectionBackground, 0.3), hcDark: null, hcLight: null }, localize('foldBackgroundBackground', \"Background color behind folded ranges. The color must not be opaque so as not to hide underlying decorations.\"), true);\n    18\u2192registerColor('editor.foldPlaceholderForeground', { light: '#808080', dark: '#808080', hcDark: null, hcLight: null }, localize('collapsedTextColor', \"Color of the collapsed text after the first line of a folded range.\"));\n    19\u2192registerColor('editorGutter.foldingControlForeground', iconForeground, localize('editorGutter.foldingControlForeground', 'Color of the folding control in the editor gutter.'));\n    20\u2192\n    21\u2192export const foldingExpandedIcon = registerIcon('folding-expanded', Codicon.chevronDown, localize('foldingExpandedIcon', 'Icon for expanded ranges in the editor glyph margin.'));\n    22\u2192export const foldingCollapsedIcon = registerIcon('folding-collapsed', Codicon.chevronRight, localize('foldingCollapsedIcon', 'Icon for collapsed ranges in the editor glyph margin.'));\n    23\u2192export const foldingManualCollapsedIcon = registerIcon('folding-manual-collapsed', foldingCollapsedIcon, localize('foldingManualCollapedIcon', 'Icon for manually collapsed ranges in the editor glyph margin.'));\n    24\u2192export const foldingManualExpandedIcon = registerIcon('folding-manual-expanded', foldingExpandedIcon, localize('foldingManualExpandedIcon', 'Icon for manually expanded ranges in the editor glyph margin.'));\n    25\u2192\n    26\u2192const foldedBackgroundMinimap = { color: themeColorFromId(foldBackground), position: MinimapPosition.Inline };\n    27\u2192\n    28\u2192const collapsed = localize('linesCollapsed', \"Click to expand the range.\");\n    29\u2192const expanded = localize('linesExpanded', \"Click to collapse the range.\");\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192export class FoldingDecorationProvider implements IDecorationProvider {\n    32\u2192\n    33\u2192\tprivate static readonly COLLAPSED_VISUAL_DECORATION = ModelDecorationOptions.register({\n    34\u2192\t\tdescription: 'folding-collapsed-visual-decoration',\n    35\u2192\t\tstickiness: TrackedRangeStickiness.AlwaysGrowsWhenTypingAtEdges,\n    36\u2192\t\tafterContentClassName: 'inline-folded',\n    37\u2192\t\tisWholeLine: true,\n    38\u2192\t\tlinesDecorationsTooltip: collapsed,\n    39\u2192\t\tfirstLineDecorationClassName: ThemeIcon.asClassName(foldingCollapsedIcon),\n    40\u2192\t});\n    41\u2192\n    42\u2192\tprivate static readonly COLLAPSED_HIGHLIGHTED_VISUAL_DECORATION = ModelDecorationOptions.register({\n    43\u2192\t\tdescription: 'folding-collapsed-highlighted-visual-decoration',\n    44\u2192\t\tstickiness: TrackedRangeStickiness.AlwaysGrowsWhenTypingAtEdges,\n    45\u2192\t\tafterContentClassName: 'inline-folded',\n    46\u2192\t\tclassName: 'folded-background',\n    47\u2192\t\tminimap: foldedBackgroundMinimap,\n    48\u2192\t\tisWholeLine: true,\n    49\u2192\t\tlinesDecorationsTooltip: collapsed,\n    50\u2192\t\tfirstLineDecorationClassName: ThemeIcon.asClassName(foldingCollapsedIcon)\n    51\u2192\t});\n    52\u2192\n    53\u2192\tprivate static readonly MANUALLY_COLLAPSED_VISUAL_DECORATION = ModelDecorationOptions.register({\n    54\u2192\t\tdescription: 'folding-manually-collapsed-visual-decoration',\n    55\u2192\t\tstickiness: TrackedRangeStickiness.AlwaysGrowsWhenTypingAtEdges,\n    56\u2192\t\tafterContentClassName: 'inline-folded',\n    57\u2192\t\tisWholeLine: true,\n    58\u2192\t\tlinesDecorationsTooltip: collapsed,\n    59\u2192\t\tfirstLineDecorationClassName: 'inline-folded',\n    77\u2192\t\tisWholeLine: true,\n    78\u2192\t\tlinesDecorationsTooltip: collapsed,\n    79\u2192\t});\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192\tprivate static readonly TrackedRangeStickiness.NeverGrowsWhenTypingAtEdges,\n   102\u2192\t\tisWholeLine: true,\n   103\u2192\t\tfirstLineDecorationClassName: ThemeIcon.asClassName(foldingExpandedIcon),\n   104\u2192\t\tlinesDecorationsTooltip: expanded,\n   105\u2192\t});\n   106\u2192\n   107\u2192\tprivate static readonly MANUALLY_EXPANDED_VISUAL_DECORATION = ModelDecorationOptions.register({\n  133\u2192\n   134\u2192\tpublic showFoldingControls: 'always' | 'never' | 'mouseover' = 'mouseover';\n   135\u2192\n   136\u2192\tpublic showFoldingHighlights: boolean = true;\n   137\u2192\n   138\u2192\tconstructor(private readonly editor: ICodeEditor) {\n   139\u2192\t}\n   140\u2192\n   141\u2192\tgetDecorationOption(isCollapsed: boolean, isHidden: boolean, isManual: boolean): IModelDecorationOptions {\n   142\u2192\t\tif (isHidden) { // is inside another collapsed region\n   143\u2192\t\t\treturn FoldingDecorationProvider.HIDDEN_RANGE_DECORATION;\n   144\u2192\t\t}\n   145\u2192\t\tif (this.showFoldingControls === 'never') {\n   146\u2192\t\t\tif (isCollapsed) {\n   147\u2192\t\t\t\treturn this.showFoldingHighlights ? FoldingDecorationProvider.NO_CONTROLS_COLLAPSED_HIGHLIGHTED_RANGE_DECORATION : FoldingDecorationProvider.NO_CONTROLS_COLLAPSED_RANGE_DECORATION;\n   148\u2192\t\t\t}\n   149\u2192\t\t\treturn FoldingDecorationProvider.NO_CONTROLS_EXPANDED_RANGE_DECORATION;\n   150\u2192\t\t}\n   151\u2192\t\tif (isCollapsed) {\n   152\u2192\t\t\treturn isManual ?\n   153\u2192\t\t\t\t(this.showFoldingHighlights ? FoldingDecorationProvider.MANUALLY_COLLAPSED_HIGHLIGHTED_VISUAL_DECORATION : FoldingDecorationProvider.MANUALLY_COLLAPSED_VISUAL_DECORATION)\n   154\u2192\t\t\t\t: (this.showFoldingHighlights ? FoldingDecorationProvider.COLLAPSED_HIGHLIGHTED_VISUAL_DECORATION : FoldingDecorationProvider.COLLAPSED_VISUAL_DECORATION);\n   155\u2192\t\t} else if (this.showFoldingControls === 'mouseover') {\n   156\u2192\t\t\treturn isManual ? FoldingDecorationProvider.MANUALLY_EXPANDED_AUTO_HIDE_VISUAL_DECORATION : FoldingDecorationProvider.EXPANDED_AUTO_HIDE_VISUAL_DECORATION;\n   157\u2192\t\t} else {\n   158\u2192\t\t\treturn isManual ? FoldingDecorationProvider.MANUALLY_EXPANDED_VISUAL_DECORATION : FoldingDecorationProvider.EXPANDED_VISUAL_DECORATION;\n   159\u2192\t\t}\n   160\u2192\t}\n   161\u2192\n   162\u2192\tchangeDecorations<T>(callback: (changeAccessor: IModelDecorationsChangeAccessor) => T): T {\n   163\u2192\t\treturn this.editor.changeDecorations(callback);\n   164\u2192\t}\n   165\u2192\n   166\u2192\tremoveDecorations(decorationIds: string[]): void {\n   167\u2192\t\tthis.editor.removeDecorations(decorationIds);\n   168\u2192\t}\n   169\u2192}\n   170\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

"     1\u2192/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     2\u2192 *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n     4\u2192 *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n     5\u2192\n     6\u2192import { Emitter, Event } from '../../../../base/common/event.js';\n     7\u2192import { IModelDecorationOptions, IModelDecorationsChangeAccessor, IModelDeltaDecoration, ITextModel } from '../../../common/model.js';\n     8\u2192import { FoldingRegion, FoldingRegions, ILineRange, FoldRange, FoldSource } from './foldingRanges.js';\n     9\u2192import { hash } from '../../../../base/common/hash.js';\n    10\u2192import { SelectedLines } from './folding.js';\n    11\u2192\n    12\u2192export interface IDecorationProvider {\n    13\u2192\tgetDecorationOption(isCollapsed: boolean, isHidden: boolean, isManual: boolean): IModelDecorationOptions;\n    14\u2192\tchangeDecorations<T>(callback: (changeAccessor: IModelDecorationsChangeAccessor) => T): T | null;\n    15\u2192\tremoveDecorations(decorationIds: string[]): void;\n    16\u2192}\n    17\u2192\n    18\u2192export interface FoldingModelChangeEvent {\n    19\u2192\tmodel: FoldingModel;\n    20\u2192\tcollapseStateChanged?: FoldingRegion[];\n    21\u2192}\n    22\u2192\n    23\u2192interface ILineMemento extends ILineRange {\n    24\u2192\tchecksum?: number;\n    25\u2192\tisCollapsed?: boolean;\n    26\u2192\tsource?: FoldSource;\n    27\u2192}\n    28\u2192\n    29\u2192export type CollapseMemento = ILineMemento[];\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192export class FoldingModel {\n    32\u2192\tprivate readonly _textModel: ITextModel;\n    33\u2192\tprivate readonly _decorationProvider: IDecorationProvider;\n    34\u2192\n    35\u2192\tprivate _regions: FoldingRegions;\n    36\u2192\tprivate _editorDecorationIds: string[];\n    37\u2192\n    38\u2192\tprivate readonly _updateEventEmitter = new Emitter<FoldingModelChangeEvent>();\n    39\u2192\tpublic readonly onDidChange: Event<FoldingModelChangeEvent> = this._updateEventEmitter.event;\n    40\u2192\n    41\u2192\tpublic get regions(): FoldingRegions { return this._regions; }\n    42\u2192\tpublic get textModel() { return this._textModel; }\n    43\u2192\tpublic get decorationProvider() { return this._decorationProvider; }\n    44\u2192\n    45\u2192\tconstructor(textModel: ITextModel, decorationProvider: IDecorationProvider) {\n    46\u2192\t\tthis._textModel = textModel;\n    47\u2192\t\tthis._decorationProvider = decorationProvider;\n    48\u2192\t\tthis._regions = new FoldingRegions(new Uint32Array(0), new Uint32Array(0));\n    49\u2192\t\tthis._editorDecorationIds = [];\n    50\u2192\t}\n    51\u2192\n    52\u2192\tpublic toggleCollapseState(toggledRegions: FoldingRegion[]) {\n    53\u2192\t\tif (!toggledRegions.length) {\n    54\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n    55\u2192\t\t}\n    56\u2192\t\ttoggledRegions = toggledRegions.sort((r1, r2) => r1.regionIndex - r2.regionIndex);\n    57\u2192\n    58\u2192\t\tconst processed: { [key: string]: boolean | undefined } = {};\n    59\u2192\t\tthis._decorationProvider.changeDecorations(accessor => {\n    60\u2192\t\t\tlet k = 0; // index from [0 ... this.regions.length]\n    61\u2192\t\t\tlet dirtyRegionEndLine = -1; // end of the range where decorations need to be updated\n    62\u2192\t\t\tlet lastHiddenLine = -1; // the end of the last hidden lines\n    63\u2192\t\t\tconst updateDecorationsUntil = (index: number) => {\n    64\u2192\t\t\t\twhile (k < index) {\n    65\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst endLineNumber = this._regions.getEndLineNumber(k);\n    66\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst isCollapsed = this._regions.isCollapsed(k);\n    67\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (endLineNumber <= dirtyRegionEndLine) {\n    68\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tconst isManual = this.regions.getSource(k) !== FoldSource.provider;\n    69\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\taccessor.changeDecorationOptions(this._editorDecorationIds[k], this._decorationProvider.getDecorationOption(isCollapsed, endLineNumber <= lastHiddenLine, isManual));\n    70\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n    71\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (isCollapsed && endLineNumber > lastHiddenLine) {\n    72\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tlastHiddenLine = endLineNumber;\n    73\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n    74\u2192\t\t\t\t\tk++;\n    75\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    76\u2192\t\t\t};\n    77\u2192\t\t\tfor (const region of toggledRegions) {\n    78\u2192\t\t\t\tconst index = region.regionIndex;\n    79\u2192\t\t\t\tconst editorDecorationId = this._editorDecorationIds[index];\n    80\u2192\t\t\t\tif (editorDecorationId && !processed[editorDecorationId]) {\n    81\u2192\t\t\t\t\tprocessed[editorDecorationId] = true;\n    82\u2192\n    83\u2192\t\t\t\t\tupdateDecorationsUntil(index); // update all decorations up to current index using the old dirtyRegionEndLine\n    84\u2192\n    85\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst newCollapseState = !this._regions.isCollapsed(index);\n    86\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis._regions.setCollapsed(index, newCollapseState);\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192\t\t\t\t\tdirtyRegionEndLine = Math.max(dirtyRegionEndLine, this._regions.getEndLineNumber(index));\n    89\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n    90\u2192\t\t\t}\n    91\u2192\t\t\tupdateDecorationsUntil(this._regions.length);\n    92\u2192\t\t});\n    93\u2192\t\tthis._updateEventEmitter.fire({ model: this, collapseStateChanged: toggledRegions });\n    94\u2192\t}\n    95\u2192\n    96\u2192\tpublic removeManualRanges(ranges: ILineRange[]) {\n    97\u2192\t\tconst newFoldingRanges: FoldRange[] = new Array();\n    98\u2192\t\tconst intersects = (foldRange: FoldRange) => {\n    99\u2192\t\t\tfor (const range of ranges) {\n   100\u2192\t\t\t\tif (!(range.startLineNumber > foldRange.endLineNumber || foldRange.startLineNumber > range.endLineNumber)) {\n   101\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn true;\n   102\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   103\u2192\t\t\t}\n   104\u2192\t\t\treturn false;\n   105\u2192\t\t};\n   106\u2192\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < this._regions.length; i++) {\n   107\u2192\t\t\tconst foldRange = this._regions.toFoldRange(i);\n   108\u2192\t\t\tif (foldRange.source === FoldSource.provider || !intersects(foldRange)) {\n   109\u2192\t\t\t\tnewFoldingRanges.push(foldRange);\n   110\u2192\t\t\t}\n   111\u2192\t\t}\n   112\u2192\t\tthis.updatePost(FoldingRegions.fromFoldRanges(newFoldingRanges));\n   113\u2192\t}\n   114\u2192\n   115\u2192\tpublic update(newRegions: FoldingRegions, selection?: SelectedLines): void {\n   116\u2192\t\tconst foldedOrManualRanges = this._currentFoldedOrManualRanges(selection);\n   117\u2192\t\tconst newRanges = FoldingRegions.sanitizeAndMerge(newRegions, foldedOrManualRanges, this._textModel.getLineCount(), selection);\n   118\u2192\t\tthis.updatePost(FoldingRegions.fromFoldRanges(newRanges));\n   119\u2192\t}\n   120\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

Number.MAX_VALUE, this.getSelectedLines(editor));\n   713\u2192\t}\n   714\u2192}\n   715\u2192\n   716\u2192class FoldAction extends FoldingAction<FoldingArguments> {\n   717\u2192\n   718\u2192\tconstructor() {\n   719\u2192\t\tsuper({\n   720\u2192\t\t\tid: 'editor.fold',\n   721\u2192\t\t\tlabel: nls.localize2('foldAction.label', \"Fold\"),\n   722\u2192\t\t\tprecondition: CONTEXT_FOLDING_ENABLED,\n   723\u2192\t\t\tkbOpts: {\n   724\u2192\t\t\t\tkbExpr: EditorContextKeys.editorTextFocus,\n   725\u2192\t\t\t\tprimary: KeyMod.CtrlCmd | KeyMod.Shift | KeyCode.BracketLeft,\n   726\u2192\t\t\t\tmac: {\n   727\u2192\t\t\t\t\tprimary: KeyMod.CtrlCmd | KeyMod.Alt | KeyCode.BracketLeft\n   728\u2192\t\t\t\t},\n   729\u2192\t\t\t\tweight: KeybindingWeight.EditorContrib\n   730\u2192\t\t\t},\n   731\u2192\t\t\tmetadata: {\n   732\u2192\t\t\t\tdescription: 'Fold the content in the editor',\n   733\u2192\t\t\t\targs: [\n   734\u2192\t\t\t\t\t{\n   735\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tname: 'Fold editor argument',\n   736\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tdescription: `Property-value pairs that can be passed through this argument:\n   737\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t* 'levels': Number of levels to fold.\n   738\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t* 'direction': If 'up', folds given number of levels up otherwise folds down.\n   739\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t* 'selectionLines': Array of the start lines (0-based) of the editor selections to apply the fold action to. If not set, the active selection(s) will be used.\n   740\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\tIf no levels or direction is set, folds the region at the locations or if already collapsed, the first uncollapsed parent instead.\n   741\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t`,\n   742\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tconstraint: foldingArgumentsConstraint,\n   743\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tschema: {\n   744\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t'type': 'object',\n   745\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t'properties': {\n   746\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t'levels': {\n   747\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t'type': 'number',\n   748\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n   749\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t'direction': {\n   750\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t'type': 'string',\n   751\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t'enum': ['up', 'down'],\n   752\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n   753\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t'selectionLines': {\n   754\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t'type': 'array',\n   755\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t'items': {\n   756\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t'type': 'number'\n   757\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   758\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   759\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   760\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n   761\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   762\u2192\t\t\t\t]\n   763\u2192\t\t\t}\n   764\u2192\t\t});\n   765\u2192\t}\n   766\u2192\n   767\u2192\tinvoke(_foldingController: FoldingController, foldingModel: FoldingModel, editor: ICodeEditor, args: FoldingArguments): void {\n   768\u2192\t\tconst lineNumbers = this.getLineNumbers(args, editor);\n   769\u2192\n   770\u2192\t\tconst levels = args && args.levels;\n   771\u2192\t\tconst direction = args && args.direction;\n   772\u2192\n   773\u2192\t\tif (typeof levels !== 'number' && typeof direction !== 'string') {\n   774\u2192\t\t\t// fold the region at the location or if already collapsed, the first uncollapsed parent instead.\n   775\u2192\t\t\tsetCollapseStateUp(foldingModel, true, lineNumbers);\n   776\u2192\t\t} else {\n   777\u2192\t\t\tif (direction === 'up') {\n   778\u2192\t\t\t\tsetCollapseStateLevelsUp(foldingModel, true, levels || 1, lineNumbers);\n   779\u2192\t\t\t} else {\n   780\u2192\t\t\t\tsetCollapseStateLevelsDown(foldingModel, true, levels || 1, lineNumbers);\n   781\u2192\t\t\t}\n   782\u2192\t\t}\n   783\u2192\t}\n   784\u2192}\n   785\u2192\n   786\u2192\n   787\u2192class ToggleFoldAction extends FoldingAction<void> {\n   788\u2192\n   789\u2192\tconstructor() {\n   790\u2192\t\tsuper({\n   791\u2192\t\t\tid: 'editor.toggleFold',\n   792\u2192\t\t\tlabel: nls.localize2('toggleFoldAction.label', \"Toggle Fold\"),\n   793\u2192\t\t\tprecondition: CONTEXT_FOLDING_ENABLED,\n   794\u2192\t\t\tkbOpts: {\n   795\u2192\t\t\t\tkbExpr: EditorContextKeys.editorTextFocus,\n   796\u2192\t\t\t\tprimary: KeyChord(KeyMod.CtrlCmd | KeyCode.KeyK, KeyMod.CtrlCmd | KeyCode.KeyL),\n   797\u2192\t\t\t\tweight: KeybindingWeight.EditorContrib\n   798\u2192\t\t\t}\n   799\u2192\t\t});\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

"   544\u2192abstract class FoldingAction<T> extends EditorAction {\n   545\u2192\n   546\u2192\tabstract invoke(foldingController: FoldingController, foldingModel: FoldingModel, editor: ICodeEditor, args: T, languageConfigurationService: ILanguageConfigurationService): void;\n   547\u2192\n   548\u2192\tpublic override runEditorCommand(accessor: ServicesAccessor, editor: ICodeEditor, args: T): void | Promise<void> {\n   549\u2192\t\tconst languageConfigurationService = accessor.get(ILanguageConfigurationService);\n   550\u2192\t\tconst foldingController = FoldingController.get(editor);\n   551\u2192\t\tif (!foldingController) {\n   552\u2192\t\t\treturn;\n   553\u2192\t\t}\n   554\u2192\t\tconst foldingModelPromise = foldingController.getFoldingModel();\n   555\u2192\t\tif (foldingModelPromise) {\n   556\u2192\t\t\tthis.reportTelemetry(accessor, editor);\n   557\u2192\t\t\treturn foldingModelPromise.then(foldingModel => {\n   558\u2192\t\t\t\tif (foldingModel) {\n   559\u2192\t\t\t\t\tthis.invoke(foldingController, foldingModel, editor, args, languageConfigurationService);\n   560\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconst selection = editor.getSelection();\n   561\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif (selection) {\n   562\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tfoldingController.reveal(selection.getStartPosition());\n   563\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   564\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   565\u2192\t\t\t});\n   566\u2192\t\t}\n   567\u2192\t}\n   568\u2192\n   569\u2192\tprotected getSelectedLines(editor: ICodeEditor) {\n   570\u2192\t\tconst selections = editor.getSelections();\n   571\u2192\t\treturn selections ? selections.map(s => s.startLineNumber) : [];\n   572\u2192\t}\n   573\u2192\n   574\u2192\tprotected getLineNumbers(args: FoldingArguments, editor: ICodeEditor) {\n   575\u2192\t\tif (args && args.selectionLines) {\n   576\u2192\t\t\treturn args.selectionLines.map(l => l + 1); // to 0-bases line numbers\n   577\u2192\t\t}\n   578\u2192\t\treturn this.getSelectedLines(editor);\n   579\u2192\t}\n   580\u2192\n   581\u2192\tpublic run(_accessor: ServicesAccessor, _editor: ICodeEditor): void {\n   582\u2192\t}\n   583\u2192}\n   584\u2192\n   585\u2192export interface SelectedLines {\n   586\u2192\tstartsInside(startLine: number, endLine: number): boolean;\n   587\u2192}\n   588\u2192\n   589\u2192export function toSelectedLines(selections: Selection[] | null): SelectedLines {\n   590\u2192\tif (!selections || selections.length === 0) {\n   591\u2192\t\treturn {\n   592\u2192\t\t\tstartsInside: () => false\n   593\u2192\t\t};\n   594\u2192\t}\n   595\u2192\treturn {\n   596\u2192\t\tstartsInside(startLine: number, endLine: number): boolean {\n   597\u2192\t\t\tfor (const s of selections) {\n   598\u2192\t\t\t\tconst line = s.startLineNumber;\n   599\u2192\t\t\t\tif (line >= startLine && line <= endLine) {\n   600\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn true;\n   601\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   602\u2192\t\t\t}\n   603\u2192\t\t\treturn false;\n   604\u2192\t\t}\n   605\u2192\t};\n   606\u2192}\n   607\u2192\n   608\u2192interface FoldingArguments {\n   609\u2192\tlevels?: number;\n   610\u2192\tdirection?: 'up' | 'down';\n   611\u2192\tselectionLines?: number[];\n   612\u2192}\n   613\u2192\n   614\u2192function foldingArgumentsConstraint(args: any) {\n   615\u2192\tif (!types.isUndefined(args)) {\n   616\u2192\t\tif (!types.isObject(args)) {\n   617\u2192\t\t\treturn false;\n   618\u2192\t\t}\n   619\u2192\t\tconst foldingArgs: FoldingArguments = args;\n   620\u2192\t\tif (!types.isUndefined(foldingArgs.levels) && !types.isNumber(foldingArgs.levels)) {\n   621\u2192\t\t\treturn false;\n   622\u2192\t\t}\n   623\u2192\t\tif (!types.isUndefined(foldingArgs.direction) && !types.isString(foldingArgs.direction)) {\n   624\u2192\t\t\treturn false;\n   625\u2192\t\t}\n   626\u2192\t\tif (!types.isUndefined(foldingArgs.selectionLines) && (!Array.isArray(foldingArgs.selectionLines) || !foldingArgs.selectionLines.every(types.isNumber))) {\n   627\u2192\t\t\treturn false;\n   628\u2192\t\t}\n   629\u2192\t}\n   630\u2192\treturn true;\n   631\u2192}\n   632\u2192\n   633\u2192class UnfoldAction extends FoldingAction<FoldingArguments> {\n   634\u2192\n   635\u2192\tconstructor() {\n   636\u2192\t\tsuper({\n   637\u2192\t\t\tid: 'editor.unfold',\n   638\u2192\t\t\tlabel: nls.localize2('unfoldAction.label', \"Unfold\"),\n   639\u2192\t\t\tprecondition: CONTEXT_FOLDING_ENABLED,\n   640\u2192\t\t\tkbOpts: {\n   641\u2192\t\t\t\tkbExpr: EditorContextKeys.editorTextFocus,\n   642\u2192\t\t\t\tprimary: KeyMod.CtrlCmd | KeyMod.Shift | KeyCode.BracketRight,\n   643\u2192\t\t\t\tmac: {\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

\\t}',\n   144\u2192\t\t/* 7*/\t'      ',\n   145\u2192\t\t/* 8*/\t'}',\n   146\u2192\t\t], [r(1, 7, -1), r(3, 5, 0)], false);\n   147\u2192\t});\n   148\u2192});\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192const
